field.value: Fragment from the Res Gestae Inscription
Fragment from the Res Gestae Divi Augusti inscription at Monumentum Ancyranum.

[SE]MEL.IMPERATOR[.DECERNENTE.PL]VRIS.TRIVMPHOS.MIHI.SEN[ATV.QVIBVS.OMNIBVS.] / [SV]PER.SEDI L[AVRVM.DE.FASCIB]VS.DEPOSVI IN.CAPIT[OLIO.VOTIS.QVAE.] / QVOQVE.BELLO.NVNCV[PAVERAM.SOL]VTIS.OB RES.A[.ME.AVT.PER.LEGATOS.] / MEOS AUSPICIS.M[E]IS.TERRA M[ARIQ]VE.P[RO]SPERE.GESTAS QV[INQVAGIENS.ET.QVIN] / QVIENS.DECREVIT.SENATVS.SVPP[LICA]NDVM.ESSE.DIS IMMO[RTALIBVS]DIES.AVTEM] / [PE]R.QVOS EX.SENATUS CONSVLTO.[S]VPLLICATVM.EST.FVERE.DC[CCLXXXX.IN.TRIVMPHIS] / [MEIS.] DVCTI [.SU]NT.ANT[E].C[V]R[RV]M[.ME]VM.REGES.AVT RE[G]VM[.]LIB[ERI.NOVEM.CONSVL] / [FVER]AM.TER DECIENS.C[VM.SCRIBEB]A[M.]HAEC[.ET.ERAM.SE]P[TIMVM.ET.TRICENSIMVM / [TRIBV]NICIAE.POTESTATIS
